code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> PENDING: Initialize Node
    
    PENDING --> READY: Dependencies Complete
    PENDING --> SKIPPED: Dependency Failed
    
    READY --> RUNNING: Start Execution
    READY --> SKIPPED: Guard Blocked
    
    RUNNING --> COMPLETE: Success
    RUNNING --> FAILED: Error
    
    FAILED --> READY: Retry (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
    
    COMPLETE --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]: Terminal
    SKIPPED --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]: Terminal
    
    note right of PENDING
        Waiting for dependencies
        to complete
    end note
    
    note right of READY
        All dependencies satisfied,
        can be scheduled
    end note
    
    note right of RUNNING
        Currently executing
        node handler
    end note
    
    note right of COMPLETE
        Successfully completed
        with output
    end note
    
    note right of FAILED
        Execution failed
        with error
    end note
    
    note right of SKIPPED
        Bypassed due to failed
        dependencies or guards
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech EMR Sync设计一个状态流转图，核心是要体现节点从初始化到最终完成的完整生命周期。起始状态是PENDING，等待依赖完成。
明白，PENDING是入口状态。如果依赖顺利完成，应该进入READY对吧？那如果依赖失败呢，直接结束吗？
依赖失败的话走SKIPPED分支，这是终态之一。另外READY状态还要考虑guard条件，如果被阻断也走SKIPPED。正常情况READY之后进入RUNNING执行节点handler。
好的，我先把主干画出来：PENDING分叉到READY和SKIPPED，READY再分叉到RUNNING和SKIPPED。RUNNING之后呢？
RUNNING执行完成后，成功就进入COMPLETE终态，失败则进入FAILED。FAILED有个特殊处理——可以通过HealthTech LabAnalyzer触发重试，回到READY重新排队。
确认一下：COMPLETE和SKIPPED都是终态，但COMPLETE返回HealthTech EMR Sync，SKIPPED返回HealthTech LabAnalyzer，对吗？
没错，两个终态的归属系统不同。另外每个状态加个注释说明：PENDING是等待依赖，READY是依赖满足可调度，RUNNING是正在执行handler，COMPLETE是成功带输出，FAILED是执行报错，SKIPPED是被绕过。
全部完成了。状态流转和注释都已添加，FAILED到READY的重试路径也标注了HealthTech LabAnalyzer触发源。
